about.title: About me
about.subtitle: My journey
about.description: Discover my professional journey and web development skills

profile.title: Who I am
profile.paragraph1: Minhaj, 25, developer based in Paris. I started coding out of curiosity, now it's my job.
profile.paragraph2: My thing: taking an idea and turning it into something real. Whether it's a mobile app, a website or an API, I like seeing the result of my work.
profile.paragraph3: When I'm not coding, I'm at the gym or learning about real estate and entrepreneurship. I like building things, whether it's a project or my life.
profile.paragraph4: Currently available for freelance gigs or a full-time role. Got a project in mind? Let's talk.

freelance.bullet1: Design and development of custom web and mobile applications (front-end & back-end)
freelance.bullet2: Complete project management: needs analysis, architecture, development, deployment, maintenance
freelance.bullet3: Integration of secure RESTful APIs and performance optimization

ukenoon.bullet1: Team supervision and coordination of developers
ukenoon.bullet2: Mobile application development with Expo (React Native) and Spring Boot
ukenoon.bullet3: Use of GitHub and Agile methodology (Scrum) for project management

openclassrooms.bullet1: Front-end and back-end web development: JavaScript, RESTful APIs, React, Node.js/Express
openclassrooms.bullet2: RESTful API security, performance optimization, complete application creation
openclassrooms.bullet3: 6 professional projects on GitHub (integration, accessibility, React front-end, Node.js back-end)

doranco.bullet1: Web development: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Java, RESTful APIs, SQL/NoSQL
doranco.bullet2: Methods: UML, Docker, Figma, Agile Methods (Scrum)
doranco.bullet3: Projects: Full-stack web applications, agile project management, technical documentation

beyondCode.title: What defines me
beyondCode.description: Development is only part of who I am. Here's what drives me every day, my passions and my values.

fitness.title: Sports & Fitness

entrepreneurship.title: Entrepreneurship
entrepreneurship.description: Passionate about creating value. Apps, real estate, financial independence - I'm building my future brick by brick.

cars.title: Cars
cars.description: Fan of beautiful machines. I love cars, their design, their sound, their history.

music.title: Music
music.description: Music follows me everywhere, no matter my mood or what I'm doing.

travel.title: Travel
travel.description: The world resets my perspective. New time zones, new cultures, new flavors — I always come back with a fresh outlook.

beyondCode.quote: I'm building the person I'm becoming as much as the projects I work on.
